allow: Bash(node -e "const en=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('d:/Repositories/TamalStacker/Assets/Resources/Localization/en.json','utf8'\)\); const es=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('d:/Repositories/TamalStacker/Assets/Resources/Localization/es-419.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('en keys:', en.entries.length, 'es keys:', es.entries.length\); const enKeys = en.entries.map\(e=>e.key\).sort\(\); const esKeys = es.entries.map\(e=>e.key\).sort\(\); const missing = enKeys.filter\(k=>!esKeys.includes\(k\)\); const extra = esKeys.filter\(k=>!enKeys.includes\(k\)\); if\(missing.length\) console.log\('Missing in es-419:', missing\); if\(extra.length\) console.log\('Extra in es-419:', extra\); if\(!missing.length && !extra.length\) console.log\('Keys match!'\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('d:/Repositories/TamalStacker/Assets/Resources/Localization/levels_es-419.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Total levels:', d.levels.length\); let empty=d.levels.filter\(l=>!l.levelDescription || l.levelDescription.trim\(\)===''\); console.log\('Empty descriptions:', empty.length\); if\(empty.length\) empty.forEach\(l=>console.log\('  Level', l.levelNumber, l.levelName\)\); d.levels.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(l=>console.log\('Level', l.levelNumber, ':', l.levelDescription.substring\(0,80\)+'...'\)\)")
